title: Sanji Needs Blood
description: On pages 2–5, this part follows Unknown person #1, Sanji, Chopper, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Jinbe, Narrator, Camie. The core story beat is sanji needs blood.
scene: The scene centers on sanji needs blood, with Unknown person #1, Sanji, Chopper, Fish-Man Island Citizens, Jinbe, Narrator, Camie driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ... Gonna...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...Live here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're so funny, Sanji-Cha Aaaan!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You guys are so lucky, getting to swim.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You can swim too, if you put a bubble on first!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Still, looks like he ended up back to normal after all, huh...? Was it pure willpower...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Really?!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: It's a real relief... if he'd had any more nosebleeds, he would have run out of blood completely...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And his blood type isn't exactly common...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Hey, Caimie! There's someone I've gotta see while I'm here on Fish-Man Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Shirahoshi
dialogue.text: Oh...? Who's that?! the mermaid Princess?

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: It's jinbe!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Boss jinbe?

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: Yeah. When ace died, two years ago, I almost lost it... It was only thanks to jinbe that I made it through all right!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've gotta see him again!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Fuhman Island Ruuquuu kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Hold it, Luffy... jinbe?! don't tell me you've been associating with more shichibukal...?!, former shichibukai...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yep. He's my friend.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the heck are you?!!

dialogue.speaker: Rayleigh
dialogue.text: Two years from now, let us meet again, on fishman island!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I will be looking forward to the day when you and your crew come to call!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: We promised to meet up again here on this island.

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Come to think of it, I did read an article saying you'd been seen with boss jinbe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So - where is he?!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Ehm... the thing is, the boss isn't actually on the island right now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WhA??!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You know how he abandoned his post as Shichibukal back then?

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Well, because of that, the former members of the fishman pirates weren't able to stay on this island any longer.

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: They all left, together with boss jinbe.

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: EHHHHHHHH?!!! Then I'm not gonna be able to see jinbe?!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Well, it would take a long time to explain in detail, but a lot of things changed on this island after the war...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Cairnie, Caimie, Caimie, Caimie, Caimie, Caimie!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're coming!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They might be coming.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A kingdom ship is coming!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They might not be on board.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Of course they'll be on board!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You guys!! Who's on board this ship?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We don't know yet!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's a rare kingdom ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A ship that doesn't come here often!

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: They could be here to capture Luffy-Chin and the others for entering the island illegally!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Eh?!

dialogue.speaker: Camie
dialogue.text: Luffy-Chin!! You and your friends have to hide!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Princes?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh? It's a Royal Gondola!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It really is?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No, it isn't!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So what if it is?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, it's not as though any of the Royal Family will be on board.

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: They wouldn't leave their palace and come all the way out to these remote regions of the island...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Make way for the three Neptunee Brothers!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aaaah!!!!The princes!!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What are they doing here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You stay nice and hidden there, Sanji-chan...

summary: Sanji Needs Blood. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
